concepts_used.title: 多元回归
concepts_used.how_used: 使用六个解释变量（失业率、毕业率、辍学率、假释违规率、监禁率、假释释放率）对犯罪率进行多元线性回归建模，得到回归方程并检验显著性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Multiple linear regression was performed on the given data using six explanatory variables: unemployment rate, graduation rate, high school dropout rate, parole violation rate, incarceration rate, and parole release rate.

concepts_used.title: t 检验
concepts_used.how_used: 对多元线性回归的每个系数进行t检验，原假设为所有系数为零，显著性水平0.05，结果p值均大于0.05，无法拒绝原假设。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: t-tests for slope were conducted on each coefficient... At a level of significance (α) of 0.05, the null hypothesis could not be rejected.

concepts_used.title: F 检验
concepts_used.how_used: 使用F检验评估整体回归的显著性，F统计量为5.1405，p值为0.1718，大于0.05，表明模型整体不显著。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The F-statistic was 5.1405, and the degrees of freedom were 6 (regression) and 2 (residual). This F-distribution... resulted in a p-value of 0.1718.

concepts_used.title: 误差度量（R²/相对误差/RMSE）
concepts_used.how_used: 报告了多元R（0.9691）、R²（0.9391）、调整R²（0.7564）和标准误差（4.753e-5）来评估模型拟合优度。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The multiple R of 0.9691 indicated that there was a strong positive correlation... The R2 of 0.9391... adjusted R2 value... standard error of the regression model... was low (4.753 x 10-5).

concepts_used.title: 残差分析与模型诊断
concepts_used.how_used: 通过残差图检查残差是否独立且正态分布，认为无显著模式，满足回归条件。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The residual plots shown in graphs 1 through 6 display no significant pattern. Therefore, it was reasonable to assume that the residuals are normally distributed and independent.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出了7条模型假设，包括Felonia是普通城市、失业率等于县水平、政策效果可迁移等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: To adequately analyze the situation presented by the scenario, several assumptions were developed. These included: 1. The city of Felonia is an average city... 2. The unemployment rate of the city is equal to that of the county. ...

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分通过真实案例（2002年华盛顿狙击手事件）引出犯罪问题，并介绍“破窗”和“三振出局”政策背景，明确论文三个目标。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: For twenty-three days in October 2002, two men terrorized the citizens of Maryland, Virginia, and Washington D.C. ... The goals of this paper are threefold.

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：Restatement、Introduction、Assumptions、Model 1/2/3/4（方法、结果）、结论。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Restatement of Problem... Introduction... Assumptions... Model 1... Model 2...
